Thank you, Emmanuele. Before we close, tell me the next steps for Brazil.
Sure. Let me give you the next steps. This week, I am going to send the agenda, and next week I am going to follow up with the private hospitals.
Good. And the Brazil report, I need it today. Is that possible?
No problem. I'll send it right now, after the call.
Perfect. And the dates for the August visit, are they confirmed?
Not yet. I'll confirm them with my team and get back to you tomorrow.
Great. If you need help with the slides, I'll prepare a template for you.
Thank you for the offer. So the outcome today is clear: the report now, the dates tomorrow, and the hospitals next week.

Emmanuele, Marc Dubois. A quick message before our upcoming meeting on Thursday. I want to talk about the next steps for Brazil, so please come with a short agenda. Two or three points, no more. And one thing from my side. After the meeting, I'll send you the summary with the actions, and I'll confirm the dates for August. If you have a question before Thursday, just write to me and I'll get back to you the same day. One last point. In the meeting, I am going to ask you for three next steps and one deadline. Think about it. That is the outcome I want. Talk to you Thursday.

Good morning, everyone. Claire Bennett here, with a short note about the upcoming Global meeting. First, the agenda. Each country is going to present the next steps for the next quarter, and Brazil, you are first again. Please keep it simple: three actions and one clear outcome. Now, two offers from my side. If you need help with the slides, write to me and I'll prepare a template for you. And if your reimbursement data is not ready, do not worry. I'll follow up with the market access team, and I'll get back to you before Friday. One more thing. After the meeting, I am going to send the final agenda, and I'll confirm the time for each country. Thank you, everyone, and see you soon.

Thank you all for the meeting. Let me give you the next steps. First, I am going to send the agenda to Paris this week. Then I'll confirm the dates for the August visit. After that, I am going to follow up with the private hospitals. And I'll get back to you with the final outcome before Friday.
